project.name: Tutorial
project.description: Starter examples — feel free to edit or delete

docs.name: Welcome
docs.content:
Tutorial Starter Pack

Tutorial sheets are pre-loaded. Start with live data instead of a blank canvas.

What's in this workspace

  • Characters sheet — click any cell to change the value
  • Sprint sheet — click any cell to change the value

Try it in 30 seconds

  1. Click any cell to edit the value
  2. Type = in a cell → formula autocomplete popover
  3. Type / in a regular cell → quick commands like /today /uuid
  4. Right-click a row → "Run simulation with this row" (when hp/atk columns exist)
  5. Press ? for shortcuts, ⌘K for global search

Step-by-step guides are also available in the coach-mark card at the bottom right.

docs.name: Welcome
docs.content:
RPG Starter Pack

Sheets tailored to the RPG domain are pre-loaded. Start with live data instead of a blank canvas.

What's in this workspace

  • Characters sheet — click any cell to change the value
  • Weapons sheet — click any cell to change the value
  • EXP Curve sheet — click any cell to change the value
  • Gacha Rates sheet — click any cell to change the value

Try it in 30 seconds

  1. Click any cell to edit the value
  2. Type = in a cell → formula autocomplete popover
  3. Type / in a regular cell → quick commands like /today /uuid
  4. Right-click a row → "Run simulation with this row" (when hp/atk columns exist)
  5. Press ? for shortcuts, ⌘K for global search

Tweaking just base/rate on the EXP Curve auto-recalculates levels 1-20. Try sorting weapons by tier (stars).

Step-by-step guides are also available in the coach-mark card at the bottom right.

docs.name: Welcome
docs.content:
FPS Shooter Starter Pack

Sheets tailored to the FPS shooter domain are pre-loaded. Start with live data instead of a blank canvas.

What's in this workspace

  • FPS Weapons sheet — click any cell to change the value

Try it in 30 seconds

  1. Click any cell to edit the value
  2. Type = in a cell → formula autocomplete popover
  3. Type / in a regular cell → quick commands like /today /uuid
  4. Right-click a row → "Run simulation with this row" (when hp/atk columns exist)
  5. Press ? for shortcuts, ⌘K for global search

TTK = 1000 / (DPS / target_hp). Average TTK across categories should be roughly equal for balance. Use a separate "Sprint Board" project for PM tasks.

Step-by-step guides are also available in the coach-mark card at the bottom right.

RTS Starter Pack

Sheets tailored to the RTS domain are pre-loaded. Start with live data instead of a blank canvas.

What's in this workspace

  • RTS Units sheet — click any cell to change the value

Try it in 30 seconds

  1. Click any cell to edit the value
  2. Type = in a cell → formula autocomplete popover
  3. Type / in a regular cell → quick commands like /today /uuid
  4. Right-click a row → "Run simulation with this row" (when hp/atk columns exist)
  5. Press ? for shortcuts, ⌘K for global search

The Counter column is rock-paper-scissors. The cycle Infantry → Cavalry → Archer → Infantry is the core idea. Use a separate "Sprint Board" project for PM tasks.

Step-by-step guides are also available in the coach-mark card at the bottom right.

Try it in 30 seconds

  2. Type = in a cell → formula autocomplete popover

  4. Right-click a row → "Run simulation with this row" (when hp/atk columns exist)

A steadily increasing payback (s) keeps the progression curve smooth. The defaults: cost 1.5x, income 1.3x. Use a separate "Sprint Board" project for PM tasks.

Step-by-step guides are also available in the coach-mark card at the bottom right.

Kanban view (shortcut K) lays cards out by status. Drag a card to a different status to move it.

Step-by-step guides are also available in the coach-mark card at the bottom right.

cells.019dfedb-a9e4-7023-bdaa-087a23c5c1de: When the Rogue's crit rate is set to 100% the critDamage multiplier isn't applied on normal attacks
cells.019dfedb-a9e4-7023-bdaa-0d6105841424: 1) Pick Rogue 2) Set critRate=1, critDamage=2 3) Normal attack deals base * 1 (expected: base * 2)

cells.019dfedb-a9e4-7023-bda9-fb7981c6da01: Economy sim returns NaN at day 9999
cells.019dfedb-a9e4-7023-bdaa-087a23c5c1de: When sim days exceed 10000 the supplyOverTime chart shows NaN
cells.019dfedb-a9e4-7023-bdaa-0d6105841424: Economy design → enter 10000 sim days → chart shows NaN in the late portion

cells.019dfedb-a9e4-7023-bdaa-8748e51425d5: Core loop is fun. Character design well-received.
cells.019dfedb-a9e4-7023-bdaa-8819c9fb15de: Tutorial too long (15+ min). Boss 1 too hard.

cells.019dfedb-a9e4-7023-bdaa-8748e51425d5: Tutorial is shorter now, smoother onboarding.
cells.019dfedb-a9e4-7023-bdaa-8819c9fb15de: Late-game inflation. Gacha pity (soft pity) feels lacking.

Playtest Starter Pack

Sheets tailored to playtest logging are pre-loaded. Start with live data instead of a blank canvas.

What's in this workspace

  • Playtest sheet — click any cell to change the value

Try it in 30 seconds

  1. Click any cell to edit the value
  2. Type = in a cell → formula autocomplete popover
  3. Type / in a regular cell → quick commands like /today /uuid
  4. Right-click a row → "Run simulation with this row" (when hp/atk columns exist)
  5. Press ? for shortcuts, ⌘K for global search

Use the average fun-score plus key feedback text for the retrospective.

Step-by-step guides are also available in the coach-mark card at the bottom right.
